'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 91''' was the ninety-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 24]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Trade Federation Attack]]
*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]]
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Motti]]
*[[Bevel Lemelisk]]
*[[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]]
*[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] - [[:Category:Creatures of Dagobah|Animals]]
*[[Drone barge/Legends|Drone barge]]
*[[Moisture farm/Legends|Moisture farming]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends#Equipment|Boba Fett's weapons and equipment]]
*[[Miy'til starfighter]]
